name: Iterative factorial
task: Create /tmp/eval_fact/fact.py with factorial(n) returning n! iteratively. Raise ValueError on negative input. factorial(0) == 1.

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_fact/fact.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); F = mod.factorial; assert F(0) == 1; assert F(1) == 1; assert F(10) == 3628800; assert F(20) == 2432902008176640000
try: F(-1)
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
